proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +31.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
R-multiple 0.61 reflects Day-6 forced-exit dominance (project_anchor §7 D-8); cohort will demote if R drifts further on next archive comparison
Portfolio is currently 100% Choppy-concentrated; if regime rotates to Bear, this boost will activate alongside any residual UP_TRI exposure — monitor at regime transition
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +31.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification is robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +31.9pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with zero Bear exposure, so activation is deferred and existing UP_TRI/Choppy concentration is not immediately compounded. Consistent with multiple prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-06) and no trader rejection on record.

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, sector=Metal (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +25.4pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.72 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Regime concentration flagged at 1.0 in Choppy; if UP_TRI/Metal trades fire in Choppy, monitor for portfolio-level concentration compounding
R-multiple 0.72 partially attributable to Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8; true edge may be understated but distribution remains under review
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +25.4pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification is robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +25.4pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.72. The sector=Metal filter narrows rather than amplifies the existing UP_TRI exposure (2 of 33 open) in a Choppy-concentrated portfolio, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental concentration. Consistent with multiple prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-06) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy regime (100%), DOWN_TRI signal (90.9%), DOWN_TRI×Choppy×IT cell (21.21%) (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy regime (100%), DOWN_TRI signal (90.9%), DOWN_TRI×Choppy×IT cell (21.21%); recommended action: Pause new DOWN_TRI entries (especially in IT and Auto sectors) until either (a) IT cell share drops below 0.20 via natural Day-6 exits or (b) cohort_health for DOWN_TRI×Choppy upgrades from Candidate to Tier M. Consider a long-side hedge (index call or BULL_PROXY add) to offset the 90.9% directional short skew if regime shows any flip signal.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bull regime flip or sharp short-squeeze in IT/Auto would unwind ~91% of the book simultaneously with no offsetting longs. Because the dominant DOWN_TRI×Choppy cohort is only Candidate-tier (n=12), there is no validated edge to absorb the drawdown — losses would compound across 30 correlated short positions in a single regime.

evidence: DOWN_TRI signal share = 30/33 = 0.909, exceeds 0.85 single-signal threshold
Both concentrated cells map to Candidate-tier cohort (n=12) — unvalidated edge
9th consecutive day of Choppy-only regime; recurring warn pattern
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (100%), DOWN_TRI signal (90.9%), DOWN_TRI×Choppy×IT cell (21.21%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new DOWN_TRI entries (especially in IT and Auto sectors) until either (a) IT cell share drops below 0.20 via natural Day-6 exits or (b) cohort_health for DOWN_TRI×Choppy upgrades from Candidate to Tier M. Consider a long-side hedge (index call or BULL_PROXY add) to offset the 90.9% directional short skew if regime shows any flip signal.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bull regime flip or sharp short-squeeze in IT/Auto would unwind ~91% of the book simultaneously with no offsetting longs. Because the dominant DOWN_TRI×Choppy cohort is only Candidate-tier (n=12), there is no validated edge to absorb the drawdown — losses would compound across 30 correlated short positions in a single regime.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (above 0.80 threshold) AND DOWN_TRI×Choppy×IT cell breaches the 20% cell threshold at 21.21%. DOWN_TRI also dominates signal mix at 30/33 = 90.9%, exceeding the 0.85 single-signal threshold. All concentration cells map only to Candidate-tier cohort (n=12), so this is unvalidated edge — the book is a heavily directional short cluster with no statistical edge support, and a Choppy→Bull regime flip would unwind nearly the entire book simultaneously.
